content.en:
Above Montenegro.

After Ye Tian came in, it was equivalent to passing the third level and he could get a reward item, and this reward item could still be chosen by him.

Soon, a dense cloud of bonus items appeared.

Ye Tian looked at it and finally chose a black stone.

This stone was the core stone of this Black Mountain, and it had the characteristics of Black Mountain, which helped Ye Tian to study the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Therefore he must choose this black stone.

And after choosing this black stone, Ye Tian entered the fourth level and did not stay in the third level.

After all, time is running out, and if you hurry up with the remaining time, you may be able to pass the fourth level and gain benefits.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the fourth level, and he also saw six people here, all of whom were top kings from the Golden God Department.

"It is worthy of being the top king level of the Golden God Department, and there are actually six king levels who have entered the fourth level!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Although he was delayed for a long time in the first level, he felt that with the difficulty of the first three levels, it was difficult to break through.

He is the Ultimate Extreme Honorable, and it is very easy for him to pass these levels, but these king-level are real king-level, which shows that they have a lot of background, and their mastery of the ultimate rules and knowledge have reached an extremely high level, perhaps many times more knowledgeable than many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters of his time.

Ye Tian felt that these six king-level, if nothing else, would become emperor-level, and they were the top emperor-level, but whether they could break through to the ancient demon level was not very clear.

And these six kings of the Golden God Department were also very surprised to see Ye Tian break into the fourth level.

"You are very powerful, which tribe are you from?" asked a king-level.

"I'm from the Eagle Ministry!"

Ye Tian revealed.

He knew very well that with the status of these people, it would be easy to investigate him, and there was no point in him concealing it.

"Eagle Department~?"

They are very unfamiliar with this name, after all, there are hundreds of thousands of tribes under the command of the Golden God Ministry, and it is natural that they have not heard of the Eagle Ministry, after all, who cares that there is only one emperor-level tribe!

They didn't talk to Ye Tian for long, but concentrated on solving the assessment of the fourth level.

The assessment of the fourth level is a ball of light, and this ball of light is connected to the core of this inheritance place.

In other words, if you crack this ball of light, you can touch the core inheritance of this ancient demon-level inheritance land.

Ye Tian immediately joined in the cracking.

"It's complicated!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

This ball of light may not seem large, but there are hundreds of millions of layers inside, each of which has countless combinations of ultimate particles.

It's no wonder that these six top kings have been here for a long time, and they still haven't cracked it, I'm afraid they are all stumped by this level.

And Ye Tian also felt a little difficult, but it was not without hope to crack it.

Immediately.

Another copy of his body began to use some ultimate weapons to help improve his comprehension and special secret techniques to forcibly improve his comprehension to crack this ball of light.

Time passed, and Ye Tian's other replica body collapsed, and he continued to replicate another replica body and continued to study.

He knew very well that this was the closest he had ever come to an Ancient Demon-level inheritance.

"If I knew that I should have come here earlier, maybe I would have had enough time to easily crack the inheritance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he didn't know the situation here, and neither did the patriarch Tsurukage, otherwise he would have come over a long time ago.

Gradually, the time for the ruins to close was approaching, and the six top kings of the Golden God Department seemed to be about to give up.

"Forget it, we can't crack it, let's go back to Montenegro and learn more about Montenegro!"

These six top kings left.

Obviously, they also knew the value of Montenegro, and perhaps also knew about the Ultimate Rules Realm, so they wanted to learn more about Montenegro.

Ye Tian was the happiest when they left, so that even if he cracked this ball of light, no one would know.

Next, he went all out, copied the duplicate body one by one, and then burned all the origins to speed up the deduction and analysis.

And just when time was about to run out, Ye Tian finally cracked the billions of layers of this ball of light.

Ye Tian's fingers penetrated the billions of layers of ultimate particles, passed the assessment of this level, and then the whole person entered this ball of light.

Here, Ye Tian saw a phantom, and it was the Fox Yi Ancient Demon.

This fox Yi Ancient Demon is a snow-white statue of ten foxes, and his face is very delicate, but he can't tell whether it is a man or a woman.

Of course, for this kind of ancient demon-level existence, the question of men and women is not a problem.

I saw the phantom left by this fox Yi ancient demon, and said: "Congratulations, you have cleared the assessment I left behind as a king-level person, here is the inheritance I left behind, maybe it is not of high value to many ancient demons, but it is still very valuable for the king-level, and it can increase the success rate of you to break through the ancient demon level a lot." I leave the inheritance, I don't ask for anything, I just ask you if you can find me in the future, the descendants of my ancient demon fox clan, you can send them back to the ancient demon fox nest in the depths of the Arakmu abyss, and accept the inheritance of the ancient demon fox clan!"

With that, the phantom dissipated.

"Ancient Demon Fox Ancient Nest!"

Ye Tian remembered this matter, if he really met the descendants of the Ancient Demon Fox Clan in the future, and he had so much strength, then he would do it.

Immediately, Ye Tian came to a ball of inheritance and accepted the inheritance.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless knowledge poured into Ye Tian's mind, and the inheritance of the Fox Yi Ancient Demon was completely obtained by Ye Tian.

However, there is too much knowledge to integrate it for a while, and the time is about the same, it is time for (Li Zhao's) to go out.

Ye Tianyi thought out of here.

Immediately after, he also left the fourth level and came to the side of Montenegro.

In this way, he should not be suspected.

Not long after he came to Montenegro's side, the time was completely up.

Airplanes!!!!!

All the generals and kings in the ancient demon-level ruins have all been moved out.

In a flash.

Ye Tian had already appeared outside the Ten Realms Fox Mountain.

"Patriarch!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Oh my God, how far did you go?"

Tsurukage asked.

"Fourth level!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

Crane Shadow gasped, Ye Tian wasted so much time in the first level, and also wasted a lot of time in the second level, and in this case, he was able to break into the fourth level.

Although he doesn't know the fourth level, he also knows that there are few people who can break through the fourth level.
